channel.title: Posts on Kevin's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Kevin's Blog

item.title: How to Start a Flask Project Using Visual Studio Code
item.description: Flask is a Python web micro-framework. “Micro” because it doesn’t require any particular tools or libraries. Flask main objective is to keep a simple but extensible core. There is no database abstraction feature, no authentication, no cookie manager … because a lot of extensions already did it well ! So, at the opposite of an all-in-one framework such as Django, you can do whatever you want with Flask but nothing more.
